{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/58428807?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/j4xT", "id": 58428807, "login": "j4xT", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU4NDI4ODA3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/j4xT", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48096", "cvss": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-668", "name": "Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere"}], "description": "### Description
In OpenFGA, when iterator caching is enabled, two distinct check requests can produce the same cache key, leading to OpenFGA reusing an earlier cached result for a subsequent request.

### Preconditions
This applies if the following preconditions are present:

- FGA runs with SharedIteratorCache enabled,
- FGA runs with ListObjectsIteratorCache enabled.

### Fix
Upgrade to version 1.16.0 or greater.

### Acknowledgements
OpenFGA would like to thank @j4xT for the discovery and the detailed report.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00101, "percentile": 0.011}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-11T20:28:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48096"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T16:17:09Z", "published_at": "2026-06-11T20:28:18Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openfga/openfga/security/advisories/GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48096", "https://github.com/openfga/openfga/releases/tag/v1.16.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openfga/openfga/security-advisories/GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openfga/openfga", "summary": "OpenFGA has cache-key delimiter injection in shared-iterator and v2 iterator that caches enables intra-store authorization-decision poisoning", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-11T20:28:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8396-jffm-qx4w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.16.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openfga/openfga"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.16.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenFGA has cache-key delimiter injection in shared-iterator and v2 iterator that caches enables intra-store authorization-decision poisoning
